# Summary

What does this change and why?

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / test / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` and `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets` are clean
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] Docs or the example config updated if needed
- [ ] Idempotent, and dry-run / rollback handled for module changes
